mapper.sql: id, code, name, name_en, type, status, parent_id, tax_id, phone, fax, email, address, established_date, description, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by
mapper.select: SELECT FROM organizations ORDER BY code
SELECT FROM organizations WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY code
SELECT FROM organizations WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY code
mapper.update: UPDATE organizations SET code = #{code}, name = #{name}, name_en = #{nameEn}, type = #{type}, status = #{status}, parent_id = #{parentId}, tax_id = #{taxId}, phone = #{phone}, fax = #{fax}, email = #{email}, address = #{address}, established_date = #{establishedDate}, description = #{description}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: UPDATE organizations SET status = 'INACTIVE', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM organizations WHERE code = #{code})
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM organizations WHERE id = #{id})
